name: Sundar Pichai
background: Sundar Pichai has served as the Chief Executive Officer of Alphabet since December 2019 and as the Chief Executive Officer of Google since October 2015. He has been a member of Alphabet’s Board of Directors since July 2017. Since joining Google in 2004, he has held various leadership roles, including overseeing product management and innovation for a suite of Google’s consumer and enterprise products.
